*
 * First of its kind, the Skeleton King will spawn 4 minions.
 * Two sorcerers on (x + 1, y + 1) & (x - 1, y + 1)
 *
 * And two death knights on (x + 1, y - 1) & (x - 1, y - 1)

*
 * Combat logic for the Skeleton King boss
 * @class
